Josh.name: Gamemaster
desc: the gamemaster for the session, controls all characters besides the players

Jorge.name: Argyle
desc: Formerly a failed celestial and repentant devil both inhabiting an elven body.
The two halves have been separated and spread across the Infinite Horizon.
Now only the celestial, and a custode from the Scale on loan to Iconoclasm.

Jorge.name: Arctos
desc: A polar bear, awakened by the grace of the Iridescent Host
Once a pet for a young Minister Vane, who would grow up to become a Calarian council member

Mike.name: Benny
desc: A nine-year-old android with the visage (and personality) of a child but the martial prowess of an adult
The son of Atum, a high-ranking heart from Belvedere. His full name is Bennix.

Noah.name: Johnny
desc: A half-elven man from Raelion. Originally a bartender, but now a mid/high level member of the Ghosts of Raelion
He was blessed by the Watcher to come back from death, to serve as some his eyes across the continent

Tanner.name: Anzu
desc: A tengu, a bird person. Black feathered with blue feathertips
The scion of the Qureshi family, an aristocratic, well-known patron and member family of Belvedere. He's run away from home.
